evals.prompt: Design a feature flag testing strategy for a new checkout flow that needs to be tested in production with both flag ON and OFF states
expected_patterns: flag enabled OR flag disabled OR flag on OR flag off
test both paths OR dual path testing
anti_patterns: using real user data in production tests

evals.prompt: Document a canary rollout plan from 1% to 100% with explicit promotion criteria at each stage
Set up automatic rollback triggers for a production deployment that should revert if error rate doubles or latency triples
anti_patterns: absolute thresholds instead of baseline comparison

evals.prompt: Write production smoke tests that verify core authentication and dashboard data loading with synthetic test accounts
expected_patterns: SMOKE_TEST_EMAIL OR SMOKE_USER OR synthetic account

evals.prompt: Define guardrail metrics for a production rollout including error rate, latency, and conversion rate comparisons
expected_patterns: latency OR P95 OR P99 OR response time
vs baseline OR before/after OR control group

evals.prompt: Plan a stale feature flag cleanup process that runs weekly to identify and remove flags that are fully rolled out and older than 14 days
expected_patterns: query flag provider OR flag platform

evals.prompt: Design a dark launch with traffic shadowing that validates new service responses without affecting users
expected_patterns: match rate OR error rate comparison
anti_patterns: shadow service returns response to user

evals.prompt: Create a non-destructive production test that creates a test document, verifies it, and cleans it up automatically
expected_patterns: always runs OR finally OR teardown
anti_patterns: test creates data and leaves it

evals.prompt: Document the rollback plan for a feature flag deployment including mechanism, time to rollback, and how to verify rollback succeeded
expected_patterns: disable flag OR feature flag OR rollback mechanism
less than 5 minutes OR <5m OR fast
verify OR confirm OR health check

evals.prompt: Plan how to test multiple interacting feature flags (new-checkout, express-pay, discount-engine-v2) in production without exhaustive 2^N testing
expected_patterns: critical combinations OR focus on interacting flags
identify flags that affect same flow
anti_patterns: no selection criteria for which combinations to test
